level.name: The Even Sum Filter
level.thoughts: This level demonstrates the power of the head_split, filter, and accumulator cells working in tandem. By looping a train and splitting it one car at a time, we can filter even numbers into an accumulator (N->S adds to total) and park them, while using the final odd element as a trigger (W->E copies total) to send the final sum to the depot.
level.instructions: Design a system that sums all the even numbers in the train (2, 4, 6, 8) and outputs the final sum (20) using the odd number (99) as a trigger.
